case_title: TOVSHTEYN, REBECCA VS CHEN, MAY et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING SENT TOCHEN, ZI QUANG RETURNED.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOVSHTEYN, REBECCA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHEN, MAY CHEN, ZI QUANG STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOVSHTEYN, REBECCA
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 28419, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-07-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-13-2007 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $950.00 FILED BY TOVSHTEYN, REBECCA AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, MAY CHEN, ZI QUANG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-07-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT CHEN, ZI QUANG RECOVER FROM APPELLANT TOVSHTEYN, REBECCA $525.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $585.00, THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPEAL WAS NOT A BAD FAITH APPEAL UNDER CCP116.790;AND THAT THE TEST OF "NECESSARY TO ACHIEVE SUBSTANTIAL JUSTICE" IN CCP116.780 WAS NOT MET. ZI QIANG CHEN AS A WITNESS AND THE OWNER COULD HAVE PRESENTED HIS CASE WITHOUT MAY CHEN. NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. SEE SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL #28419.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $500.00 FILED BY CHEN, MAY CHEN, ZI QUANG AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT TOVSHTEYN, REBECCA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-22-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, MAY
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT TOVSHTEYN, REBECCA
DEFENDANT FILED REQUEST TO ADVANCE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. ($10.00 SERVICE FEE PAID BY CASH) COMMISSIONER TO SIGN ORDER.
PLTF'S REQUEST FOR POSTPONEMENT OF HRG. ORDER SUBMITTED TO COMMISSIONER. $10.00 FEE PAID.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-13-2007, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO AUG-22-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 NO FURTHER CONTINUANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, ZI QUANG

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CHEN, MAY CHEN, ZI QUANG RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT TOVSHTEYN, REBECCA $525.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $555.00, CROSS-PLAINTIFF MARY CHEN DISMISSED FROM DEFENDANT CLAIM-NOT THE REGISTERED OWNER OF THE SUBJECT VEHICLE. PLAINTIFF AND CROSS-DEFENDANT TOVSHTEYN WAIVED SERVICE OF DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
